questions.question: Describe the key characteristics of Flow-Oriented Modeling in the context of requirement modeling strategies. (5 marks)
questions.hint: Focus on flow, process, and user interaction

questions.question: What are the advantages of using Flow-Oriented Modeling in software development projects? (10 marks)
questions.hint: Discuss the benefits of modeling flows and user interactions

questions.question: An organization is developing a new e-commerce platform. The requirement modeling team decides to use Flow-Oriented Modeling. What steps would the team take to apply this strategy effectively? (15 marks)
questions.hint: Describe the steps involved in modeling and analyzing the workflow
